# tfe_team_token

Generates a new team token. If no description is provided, it follows the legacy behavior to override the existing, descriptionless token if one exists.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `team_id` (String) ID of the team.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the token, which must be unique per team.
- `expired_at` (String) The token's expiration date.
- `force_regenerate` (Boolean) When set to true will force the audit trail token to be recreated.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the token
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated token.
